title: 🔓 AI Endpoints, Vapes, and Browsers... Who Let This Happen?
description: Tech is showing up in places it has no business being. A vape turned webserver, Chrome sneaking in AI, Torvalds dropping F-bombs on bad code, and over 1,000 Ollama endpoints left naked on the internet. This week’s stories prove: just because you can doesn’t mean you should.
author: Thebyte

title: 🚀 AI Showdowns: Apple Rallies, OpenAI Retreats, and DeepSeek Stumbles
description: Apple calls AI bigger than the internet, OpenAI backtracks after GPT-4o backlash, and DeepSeek’s chip gamble stalls...this week, the AI world was anything but quiet.
author: Thebyte

title: 🦟 Lasers, LLMs & Local AI: Your Byte-Sized Tech Brief
description: From shopping inside ChatGPT to Netflix’s latest streaming stats and the rise of smarter AI agents, this edition is packed with the future of tech. Don’t miss the tools, trends, and jaw-dropping headlines shaping what we watch, buy, and build next.
author: Thebyte
